chain.thought: Explanation: Count the nations with at least one gold medal: Soviet Union, United States, East Germany, Italy, Japan, Hungary, West Germany, United Kingdom, Poland, Yugoslavia, Netherlands, Austria, Bulgaria, and France. There are 14 such countries.

judge_thought: Explanation: Count the nations with at least one gold medal. The countries with gold > 0 are: Soviet Union, United States, East Germany, Italy, Japan, Hungary, West Germany, United Kingdom, Poland, Yugoslavia, Netherlands, Austria, Bulgaria, and France. That makes 14 countries.
